# Project Markings

```terraform
resource "foundry_project_markings" "example-project-markings" {
  project_rid = foundry_project.example-project.id
  project_markings = ["example-marking-id"]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `project_rid` (String) RID of the Project.

### Optional

- `project_markings` (Set of String) List of the IDs of the Markings directly applied to this Project.
